feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,080Chapters: 11/55Kudos: 70

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: Waterfall
entry.summary:
Author: FallingLeaf1298

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,640Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 1

Summary: They found it there, in the woods. It was able to change destiny and fate itself. The interwoven golden strands becoming a more complicated web from the moment that they found it.

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,892Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?Season 2 of The Bond Series (I have fixed and reposted Season 1- I suggest you read that first, or this season won't make much sense). Note, you'll see each "book" in this season titled as an episode- make's it easier to follow the timeline, I think. For those who wished for less Merlin Whump and more Arthur- I have failed you, deeply :( I did make efforts to respect the "I wish Merlin was conscious more" requests!

entry.summary:
Author: Escapeofreality_02

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,095Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 135

Summary: Something happens during the final battle between Merlin and Morgana. Arthur and Merlin wake up at the begining, before they even met. After everything they've been through, they deserve their happy ending and no one was going to mess that up for them.

entry.title: Forbidden
entry.summary:
Author: Ahgase2002

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,456Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 141

Summary: "Your manservant is quite devoted" Mithian observed, following his gaze. Arthur snapped his attention back to her. "Merlin? He's adequate. When he's not being impossibly clumsy or insolent." "Strange. I've heard others speak of him with great admiration. They say he's fiercely loyal, I even heard that he's saved your life on multiple occasions." "He exaggerates his own importance." Mithian tilted her head, studying him. "You watch him quite frequently." Prince Arthur is in love with his manservant.

entry.title: So what did we miss?
entry.summary:
Author: TheRealSteve

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,465Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Arthur's new(ish) in town and Merlin's new(er).Arthur's really trying at this whole community thing, but somehow still causing problems.All Merlin does is make an entrance, meet a baker, and watch a marriage break down.And then report the drama back to Gaius and Geoffrey. Obviously.

entry.title: A higher probability of death rather than sex.
entry.summary:
Author: TheRatatinna

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,002Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

Summary: ‘I did not fuck you,’ he deadpanned, because no matter what all the signs said, people like Arthur didn’t have sex with people like Merlin; it was simply just how the world worked. ‘Of course not’, Arthur spluttered indignantly. Merlin cursed himself for feeling disappointed. He already knew that his pining was one-sided, after there was no way Arthur would… ‘I’m the one who fucked you’, the blonde moron clarified. In short, this is the dumbest thing I've ever written.

entry.title: The Warlock Diaries
entry.summary:
Author: TunaLerry

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,820Chapters: 8/24Kudos: 14

Summary: Merlin looked up at the overcast sky and sighed. He lived in a world that was at once a place of unparalleled, sparkling beauty and a noxious, foul, suffocating cage. Three months already. ‘Hope my old man’s eating properly.’ He thought. It seemed just the other day he had gone into the woods to gather herbs, where he had met three kidnappers; let us call them Villagers One, Two, and Three. They were after servsnts for the royal palace, and in a word, they offered the world’s most forceful and unpleasant employment. Now, it wasn’t that he wouldn’t be paid, and with a couple years’ work, there was that glimmer of hope that he might even be able to come back to his hometown. There were worse ways to earn a living—if one went to the royal city of one’s own volition.But Merlin, who was making his way just fine as an apothecary, thank you very much, saw it solely trouble. Or: An apothecary diaries and Merlin crossover au

entry.title: How Fatherhood Changes a Man (and Certain Policies of State)
entry.summary:
Author: mayoInYourWalls

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 60,625Chapters: 12/20Kudos: 45

Summary: Most everyone Merlin knew warned him that nothing good would ever come of his little (though astonishingly requited) crush on the Lady Morgana. Merlin was, as of now, finding himself in agreement, as she made her dramatic return to Camelot one year after Merlin had attempted to kill her with hemlock. But when Merlin discovers the child, his child, he can say at least one very good thing, as well many more exceedingly ridiculous and complicated things, certainly had come of it. Featuring pervasive passive aggression and a general sense of melancholy, an extended and distinctly non peaceful political process to legalising magic, a not entirely willing family trip to Ealdor, and some foreign diplomatic negotiations somewhat lacking in diplomacy.

entry.title: Insanity
entry.summary:
Author: RomaMarufixx

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,116Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin is a patient in a mental health hospital and Arthur is her doctor. Merlin has feelings for Arthur and Arthur has feelings for Merlin, but the two of them shouldn't be together, with their doctor patient relationship as well as their age gap but after fixing some misunderstandings, is there a way for them to be together? Old work originally posted on FF.net in 2013.

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,954,847Chapters: 126/?Kudos: 1,625

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,543Chapters: 4/9Kudos: 25

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 332,660Chapters: 71/110Kudos: 3,267

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,546Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 174

Summary: The night before Arthur faces his uncle's wraith, Merlin gives him a sword, a favor, and—unexpectedly—his heart. What begins as comfort before battle becomes something neither can deny: a bond that burns gold in their chests and rewrites the prophecy itself. But Camelot is no place for love that defies a king's law. When the Questing Beast appears in the Forest Sauvage and Morgana's magic begins to wake, Arthur must choose between the prince Uther demands and the king Albion needs. Between fear and wonder. Between destiny and desire. No longer two sides of the same coin—they're becoming one joined at the heart. And the land itself is watching. Canon divergence from 1x10. Slow-burn that catches fire. Epic scope, intimate moments, and a love that changes everything.

entry.title: makes the whole world blind
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,015Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 214

Summary: “Put down your sword,” the man said. “Arthur,” Leon began, but Arthur was already doing it. He laid the sword on the ground and stood with his hands up, showing that he was unarmed. “Now release him,” he said. He still wasn’t looking at Merlin, because if he looked at him now he knew exactly what he would find, and he wasn’t sure he’d be able to go through with it if he saw Merlin watching him with those beautiful, blazing eyes. “Release him, and I’ll come with you. Harm him, and you all die.”

entry.title: Island in the Sun
entry.summary:
Author: bad_peppermint

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,113Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: It’s stupid, really. Dumb. The kind of mistake Arthur can’t believe he’d make.He wades into the water without hesitation, a familiar cold rush that soaks his shorts and rashguard in moments, and waves to a couple of familiar faces in the shallows before he throws himself onto his board. He lets the waves crash over his head on his way out, distracted by the sun dipping towards the horizon and the gulls overhead and the memory of Merlin’s lips on his skin – it really is a gorgeous day, fuck.Or it was.

entry.title: the ghost come back
entry.summary:
Author: indigotigress7

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,660Chapters: 2/6Kudos: 20

Summary: Twenty-first-century Merlin, tired of waiting for Arthur to return, travels back in time determined to make the best of a second chance in Camelot.(Gaius, still reeling from watching his nephew drink from a poisoned chalice and nearly perish from its effects, is almost too relieved that Merlin has woken up at all to notice how strangely he’s behaving.)(Almost.)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: only my lover, not i, can keep my soul
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,090Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: Arthur looked at him first.Their eyes met and Arthur didn’t look confused. Didn’t look questioning. Didn’t look like a man trying to understand something new.His eyes—Merlin’s breath caught, just slightly.Recognition. Memory. Like something long missing had finally settled back into place.
